description: Russian paramilitary expeditionary force established by the Ministry of Defence in 2023, taking over Wagner Group operations in Africa. Provides military support, training, and counterterrorism cooperation in Sahel states, Libya, and Central African Republic. Sanctioned by the UK in 2024.

country_links.evidence_quote: On 24 January 2024, military personnel of Russia's Africa Corps... arrived in Burkina Faso to provide security...
country_links.context: The Africa Corps arrived in Burkina Faso to provide security and established a military base there.

country_links.evidence_quote: By mid-2025, Africa Corps replaced Wagner group personnel in CAR.
country_links.context: The Africa Corps replaced Wagner group personnel in the Central African Republic.
The Africa Corps has a presence in Equatorial Guinea, with approximately 200 personnel.
The Africa Corps has a presence in Libya, with approximately 800–1,200 personnel.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Russian delegation headed by the Africa Corps, met in December 2025 with Madagascar’s interim president... In January 2026, Russia sent military equipment and personnel to train the Madagascar Armed Forces.
country_links.context: The Africa Corps met with Madagascar's interim president and sent military equipment and personnel to train the armed forces.

country_links.evidence_quote: In December 2024, the Russian Ministry of Defence deployed 1,000 soldiers from the Africa Corps to Mali...
country_links.context: The Africa Corps deployed soldiers to Mali, conducted operations, and committed atrocities there.

country_links.evidence_quote: the corps rescued two employees of a Russian geological exploration company who were abducted by Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin in Niger two years earlier.
country_links.context: The Africa Corps rescued two employees abducted in Niger, indicating its presence there.

country_links.evidence_quote: The UK Defence Ministry claimed that the Africa Corps was also deployed in the 2024 Kharkiv offensive during the Russo-Ukrainian war.
country_links.context: The Africa Corps was deployed in the 2024 Kharkiv offensive during the Russo-Ukrainian war.
